zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Talbot於1379年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯時，他的父親Edmund Talbot30歲，母親Margery Byron27歲。他於1400年與Agnes Catterall Lady在英國英格蘭越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1436年在英國英格蘭越可爾米頓享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Talbot was born in 1379, in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Edmund Talbot, was 30 and his mother, Margery Byron, was 27. He married Agnes Catterall Lady in 1400, in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1436, in Mitton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Talbot est né en 1379, à Bashall Eaves, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edmund Talbot, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margery Byron, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Catterall Lady en 1400, à Bashall Eaves, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1436, à Mitton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Talbotが1379年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアバシャル エエイベスで生まれた時，父Edmund Talbotは30歳，母Margery Byronは27歳であった。1400年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアバシャル エエイベスでAgnes Catterall Ladyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1436年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアミットオンで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Talbot(이)가 1379년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 배샤 이브스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund Talbot(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Byron(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 배샤 이브스에서 Agnes Catterall Lady(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1436년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 미턴에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Talbot родился в 1379 г. в местности башолл эавесь, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Edmund Talbot было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Byron, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Catterall Lady в 1400 г. в местности башолл эавесь, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1436 г. в местности миттон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.
